purpose: COS Lending Selling Datatools is a data pipeline repository that extracts, transforms, and loads data from the Cross River Bank lending and selling systems. It serves as the analytical data layer for the lending business, providing curated data models for reporting and analysis.
businessFeatures: Contract and fee parameter data ingestion

apis.purpose: Interface for Airflow DAG execution and monitoring

dataEntities.name: Loan
dataEntities.description: Representation of a loan with origination and sale status

dataEntities.name: Contract
dataEntities.description: Terms and conditions for loan agreements

dataEntities.name: Fee
dataEntities.description: Fee parameters and calculations for loans

dataEntities.name: Volume
dataEntities.description: Loan volume data used for fee calculations

messagingPatterns.name: LoanDataIngestion
messagingPatterns.description: Triggers extraction of loan data from source system

messagingPatterns.name: ContractIngestion
messagingPatterns.description: Triggers extraction of contract data from source system

integrations.system: Cross River Bank Selling Web API

findings.title: Hardcoded S3 credentials in aws_utils.py
findings.description: The file dags/projects/utils/aws_utils.py contains hardcoded S3 credentials (username and password) for local development. These should be moved to environment variables or a secure configuration to prevent credential exposure.

findings.title: Incomplete ingestion task implementation
findings.description: The bootstrapping_dag.py contains TODO comments indicating incomplete implementation of ingestion tasks. The ingestion functionality is critical for the data pipeline but appears to be unfinished, which could cause data availability issues.
